name: allysongs-bot
description: Bot de WhatsApp com comando de ajuda usando open-wa

scripts.start:vps: CHROME_PATH=${CHROME_PATH:-$(command -v chromium-browser || command -v chromium || command -v /snap/bin/chromium || command -v google-chrome-stable)} PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH=${PUPPETEER_EXECUTABLE_PATH:-$(command -v chromium-browser || command -v chromium || command -v /snap/bin/chromium || command -v google-chrome-stable)} PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true node index.js
